zh.lifeSummary: 當Ade de Coucy於1157年出生在法國皮卡迪艾斯庫希-拉-維爾時，她的父親Raoul Ier de Coucy23歲，母親Agnès dite 'la Boiteuse' de Hainaut16歲。她於大約1188年與Diederik II VAN BEVEREN在法國皮卡迪索姆波福斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1195年享年38歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ade de Coucy于1157年出生在法国皮卡迪艾斯庫希-拉-維爾时，她的父亲Raoul Ier de Coucy23岁，母亲Agnès dite 'la Boiteuse' de Hainaut16岁。她于大约1188年与Diederik II VAN BEVEREN在法国皮卡迪索姆波福斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1195年享年38岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Coucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Arabic   Khoury   or   Khouri   ‘priest’. Compare   Courey  ,   Couri  , and   Cury  .
French: habitational name from a place so named in Vienne.

variants.name: Khoury
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Nabil, Sami, Samir, Issa, Ibrahim, Ramzi, Bassam, Fouad, Habib, Issam, Jamil, Riad.  French Michel, Antoine, Emile, Pierre, Andre, Camille, Clemence, Clovis, Georges, Gisele, Henri, Jacques.

Arabic (mainly Lebanon, Syria, and Jordan): from khūrī ‘priest’, in particular a Christian priest. This surname is used among Christians, including Assyrians/Chaldeans. Compare Cory , Coury , Cury , Elkhoury , Khouri , Kory , Koury , and Kury .

nameMeanings.name: Ade
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Cade
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which originated as a nickname from a word denoting something round and lumpish. It is one of several given names that owe their origin to their use for a character in  Margaret Mitchell's  novel Gone with the Wind (  1936 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Ade de Coucy was born in 1157, in Coucy-la-Ville, Aisne, Picardie, France, her father, Raoul Ier de Coucy, was 23 and her mother, Agnès dite 'la Boiteuse' de Hainaut, was 16. She married Diederik II VAN BEVEREN about 1188, in Boves, Somme, Picardie, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1195, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ade de Coucy est née en 1157, à Coucy-la-Ville, Aisne, Picardie, France, son père, Raoul Ier de Coucy, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Agnès dite 'la Boiteuse' de Hainaut, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Diederik II VAN BEVEREN environ 1188, à Boves, Somme, Picardie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1195, à l’âge de 38 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ade de Coucy 1157 in Coucy-la-Ville, Aisne, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Raoul Ier de Coucy 23 und ihre Mutter Agnès dite 'la Boiteuse' de Hainaut 16. Sie hat um 1188 in Boves, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich Diederik II VAN BEVEREN geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1195 im Alter von 38 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ade de Coucy è nata il nel 1157 nel Coucy-la-Ville, Aisne, Picardie, Francia, sua padre, Raoul Ier de Coucy, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Agnès dite 'la Boiteuse' de Hainaut, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Diederik II VAN BEVEREN circa 1188, nel Boves, Somme, Picardie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1195, all'età di 38 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ade de Coucyが1157年にフランスピカーディエイスンコウシ-ラ-ヴィルで生まれた時，父Raoul Ier de Coucyは23歳，母Agnès dite 'la Boiteuse' de Hainautは16歳であった。約1188年にフランスピカーディソンメボベスでDiederik II VAN BEVERENと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1195年に38歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ade de Coucy(이)가 1157년 프랑스 피카디 아이스니 코우시-라-빌에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Raoul Ier de Coucy(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnès dite 'la Boiteuse' de Hainaut(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 대략 1188년 프랑스 피카디 솜 보브스에서 Diederik II VAN BEVEREN(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1195년 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ade de Coucy nasceu em 1157, em Coucy-la-Ville, Aisne, Picardie, França, seu pai, Raoul Ier de Coucy, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Agnès dite 'la Boiteuse' de Hainaut, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Diederik II VAN BEVEREN aproximadamente 1188, em Boves, Somme, Picardie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1195, com 38 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ade de Coucy родилась в 1157 г. в местности коуси-ла-вилл, эисн, пикарди, Франция, её отцу по имени Raoul Ier de Coucy было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Agnès dite 'la Boiteuse' de Hainaut, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Diederik II VAN BEVEREN около 1188 г. в местности бовесь, сомм, пикарди, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1195 г. в возрасте 38 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ade de Coucy nació en 1157, en Coucy-la-Ville, Aisne, Picardie, Francia, su papá, Raoul Ier de Coucy, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Agnès dite 'la Boiteuse' de Hainaut, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Diederik II VAN BEVEREN aproximadamente 1188, en Boves, Somme, Picardie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1195, a la edad de 38 años.
